data.name: InvalidReservationDates
data.value: The end date must be strictly after the start date.

data.name: EquipmentNotAvailable
data.value: The requested equipment is not available for the selected period.

data.name: DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the reservation operation.

data.name: InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Reservations.

data.name: EquipmentOccupyFailed
data.value: Failed to mark the equipment as occupied in the Gym context.
